title: Belgium probes synagogue blast as mayor slams ‘antisemitic’ act
summary_full: "This is all intentional and targeted. We condemn this antisemitic act as strongly as possible," said Willy Demeyer, the mayor of Liege, where the synagogue is located
summary_public: "This is all intentional and targeted. We condemn this antisemitic act as strongly as possible," said Willy Demeyer, the mayor of Liege, where the synagogue is located
